title: callianthe macrantha
intro: Callianthe macrantha, also known as the "red salvia," is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Callianthe macrantha include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting immune function. Callianthe macrantha is often prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional medicine practices.
